mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month change in FEDFUNDS raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, reducing S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when the policy-rate trend is upward.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports FEDFUNDS value of 1.04 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month FEDFUNDS changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward observations or if the 3-year rolling Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation crosses above a high-inflation threshold, investors price tighter future policy and lower real earnings multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports CPIAUCSL value of 243.79 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered high-inflation crossings do not produce lower mean 20-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods at p < 0.05 or if triggered returns are positive in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in UNRATE and slowdown in PAYEMS growth signals labor-market deterioration that lowers expected earnings and risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months while PAYEMS 3-month growth decelerates
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports UNRATE value of 4.4 and PAYEMS value of 146404.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations or if the interaction term adds no predictive power over separate UNRATE and PAYEMS terms in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS indicates resilient consumer demand and supports near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports RSAFS value of 473513.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS 3-month momentum is not associated with higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum periods at p < 0.05 or if the rolling Rank IC stays below 0.03 for 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST below its recent trend signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports HOUST value of 1092.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside-threshold events are followed by non-negative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if downside events fail to underperform all other periods by at least 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving production, capacity utilization, and cyclical earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days after release.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports INDPRO value of 105.16 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO 3-month momentum has a 5-day forward hit rate at or below 50% or if its mean 5-day S&P 500 return is not above the unconditional mean in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising FEDFUNDS combined with falling HOUST identifies policy tightening that is already damaging rate-sensitive demand, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months while HOUST falls over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports FEDFUNDS value of 1.04 and HOUST value of 1092.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-up and HOUST-down state does not underperform periods with only one condition active, or if the interaction coefficient is statistically insignificant at p > 0.10 in rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of UNRATE above its trailing-year low by a material amount signals recession-risk repricing and weakening earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses more than 0.5 percentage points above its trailing 12-month minimum
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot reports UNRATE value of 4.4 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE threshold crossings are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below unconditional mean returns.
